step.1.helper: Just your first name keeps things casual.
step.1.title: First things first — what should we call you?
step.10.helper: Don't be shy — even small ones count. Select all that apply.
step.10.opt.honor_roll.label: Academic honor roll or similar
step.10.opt.international.label: International competition or recognition
step.10.opt.national.label: Regional or national competition placement
step.10.opt.none.label: None yet — I'm building towards it
step.10.opt.published.label: Published something (article, research, creative work)
step.10.opt.scholarship.label: Scholarship or grant I already received
step.10.opt.school_award.label: School-level award or prize
step.10.title: Any formal recognition?
step.11.helper: Pick the one that feels most true.
step.11.opt.career.label: I want to pursue a career that requires a specific degree
step.11.opt.escape.label: I want to escape my current environment and experience something new
step.11.opt.expected.label: It's the expected path, and I want to see where it leads
step.11.opt.explore.label: I want to explore ideas and figure out what I'm passionate about
step.11.opt.mix.label: A mix of all of the above honestly
step.11.opt.people.label: I want to meet people from all over the world and grow as a person
step.11.opt.research.label: I want access to research, labs, and opportunities I can't get elsewhere
step.11.title: What's the main thing driving you towards university?
step.12.helper: You can always change your mind. Select up to 3.
step.12.opt.arts.label: Arts, Design & Architecture
step.12.opt.business.label: Business, Economics & Finance
step.12.opt.cs.label: Computer Science & AI
step.12.opt.education.label: Education
step.12.opt.engineering.label: Engineering & Technology
step.12.opt.hospitality.label: Hospitality, Tourism & Culinary
step.12.opt.humanities.label: Humanities (history, philosophy, literature)
step.12.opt.law.label: Law & Political Science
step.12.opt.math.label: Mathematics & Statistics
step.12.opt.media.label: Media, Communications & Journalism
step.12.opt.medicine.label: Medicine & Health
step.12.opt.performing.label: Performing Arts & Music
step.12.opt.science.label: Science & Research (biology, chemistry, physics, environment)
step.12.opt.social.label: Social Sciences & Psychology
step.12.opt.unsure.label: I have no idea yet — show me everything
step.12.title: What area of study are you drawn to?
step.13.opt.balanced.label: Someone living a balanced, meaningful life — work and beyond
step.13.opt.creative.label: A creative who makes things that move people
step.13.opt.founder.label: A founder or entrepreneur building something of my own
step.13.opt.impact.label: I want to make a real difference in my community or the world
step.13.opt.leader.label: A leader who shapes teams, orgs, or policy
step.13.opt.researcher.label: A researcher pushing the boundaries of what we know
step.13.opt.specialist.label: A specialist who is world-class at one thing
step.13.opt.unsure.label: Honestly, I just want to figure it out step by step
step.13.title: Fast forward 10 years — which version of yourself excites you most?
step.14.affirmation: Thanks for being open — we prioritize scholarship matches for you.
step.14.opt.critical.label: Critical — I need a full scholarship or I can't go
step.14.opt.helpful.label: Helpful — partial support would make a big difference
step.14.opt.nice.label: Nice to have — I have some resources but would welcome help
step.14.opt.none.label: Not a concern — finances aren't a barrier for me
step.14.opt.very.label: Very important — I need significant aid to make it work
step.14.title: How important is financial support when choosing a university?
step.15.opt.anywhere.label: Anywhere in the world — the further the adventure, the better
step.15.opt.closeish.label: Close-ish to home — I want to visit family sometimes
step.15.opt.near_city.label: I'd prefer to stay in or near my city
step.15.opt.own_country_far.label: Within my own country but far from home
step.15.opt.region.label: Another country, but preferably a specific region
step.15.title: How far are you open to going?
step.16.opt.big_city.label: Big city campus — cafes, culture, and chaos
step.16.opt.campus_town.label: A dedicated campus town where university IS the town
step.16.opt.mixed.label: Mixed — urban but with a proper campus feel
step.16.opt.no_pref.label: Doesn't matter much to me
step.16.opt.quiet.label: Quiet, green, and residential — I need space to think
step.16.title: What kind of environment sounds like you?
step.17.opt.large.label: Large (20,000+ students) — more resources, more people
step.17.opt.medium.label: Medium (5,000–20,000) — good balance of both worlds
step.17.opt.no_pref.label: No preference — show me what matches my profile
step.17.opt.small.label: Small (under 5,000) — tight community, closer with professors
step.17.title: How big do you want your university to be?
step.18.opt.aid.label: Scholarship and financial aid availability
step.18.opt.alumni.label: Strong alumni network and career connections
step.18.opt.class_size.label: Class sizes and access to professors
step.18.opt.diversity.label: Diversity and international community
step.18.opt.location.label: Location and city life
step.18.opt.program.label: Strong program in my specific field
step.18.opt.reputation.label: Academic reputation and rankings
step.18.opt.research.label: Research opportunities and labs
step.18.opt.sports.label: Sports and athletics facilities
step.18.opt.student_life.label: Student life, clubs, and campus culture
step.18.title: What matters most to you in a university?
step.19.opt.flexible.label: Flexible / self-directed — I do my best work with autonomy
step.19.opt.lecture.label: Lecture-heavy with structured coursework — I like clarity
step.19.opt.no_pref.label: I don't have a strong preference yet
step.19.opt.project.label: Project-based and collaborative — I want to build things
step.19.opt.research.label: Research-focused — I want to dig deep and contribute new ideas
step.19.title: What kind of learning environment do you thrive in?
step.2.opt.gap_year.label: I took a gap year (or two 😄)
step.2.opt.grad.label: I'm applying for graduate school
step.2.opt.graduated.label: I just graduated — figuring out next steps
step.2.opt.high_school.label: I'm still in high school
step.2.opt.other.label: Something else
step.2.opt.transfer.label: I'm looking to transfer universities
step.2.title: Hey {name}! Where are you at right now?
step.20.opt.1_2_years.label: I'm 1–2 years out — early planning mode
step.20.opt.exploring.label: I'm just exploring for now, no rush
step.20.opt.next_cycle.label: Next cycle — Fall 2027
step.20.opt.this_cycle.label: This cycle — Fall 2026 or Spring 2027
step.20.title: What's your target intake?
step.21.opt.admitted.label: I've been admitted somewhere but want to explore options
step.21.opt.applied.label: I've applied — waiting to hear back
step.21.opt.just_starting.label: Just starting — I haven't done anything yet
step.21.opt.researching.label: I've been researching, but haven't applied anywhere
step.21.opt.started_apps.label: I've started applications at some schools
step.21.title: How far along are you in your application journey?
step.22.helper: Pick the one that hits closest.
step.22.opt.afford.label: I can't afford university without a scholarship
step.22.opt.confident.label: Honestly, I'm pretty confident — just want the right list
step.22.opt.grades.label: I don't know if my grades/scores are good enough
step.22.opt.language.label: Language — English isn't my first language
step.22.opt.no_guidance.label: I don't have anyone guiding me through this
step.22.opt.overwhelming.label: The application process feels overwhelming — I don't know where to start
step.22.opt.what_study.label: I don't know what I want to study
step.22.opt.wrong_uni.label: I'm worried I'll pick the wrong university
step.22.title: What's the thing that worries you most about this whole process?
step.3.helper: We use this for timezone and regional scholarships.
step.3.title: And where in the world are you from?
step.4.affirmation: Got it — we'll find schools where students just like you thrive.
step.4.helper: Be honest — this helps us find the right fit for YOU.
step.4.opt.exact.label: Tell us your exact GPA
step.4.opt.improving.label: I've had a tough time, but I'm working on it
step.4.opt.middle.label: Solid middle ground — consistent and steady
step.4.opt.mixed.label: Up and down — some subjects I crush, others not so much
step.4.opt.strong.label: Pretty strong — above average most of the time
step.4.opt.top.label: Mostly top marks — I'm usually near the top
step.4.title: How have your grades been overall?
step.5.helper: Even if just one! Select all that apply.
step.5.opt.art.label: Art, design, or music
step.5.opt.business.label: Economics or business
step.5.opt.cs.label: Computer science / coding
step.5.opt.literature.label: Literature, writing, or languages
step.5.opt.math.label: Math or anything numbers-related
step.5.opt.none.label: Nothing really stood out yet — and that's okay
step.5.opt.pe.label: Physical education / health
step.5.opt.psych.label: Psychology or philosophy
step.5.opt.science.label: Science (physics, chemistry, biology)
step.5.opt.social.label: History, politics, or social studies
step.5.title: Which subjects did you genuinely enjoy?
step.6.helper: Select all that apply — or none.
step.6.opt.act.label: ACT
step.6.opt.duolingo.label: Duolingo English Test
step.6.opt.ielts.label: IELTS
step.6.opt.national.label: A national/regional exam (IB, A-Levels, Gaokao, CBSE, Abitur…)
step.6.opt.none_pref.label: None yet — and I'd prefer not to
step.6.opt.planning.label: None yet — I'm planning to take one
step.6.opt.sat.label: SAT
step.6.opt.toefl.label: TOEFL
step.6.title: Have you taken any of these?
step.7.opt.hands_on.label: Hands-on: I learn by doing, building, experimenting
step.7.opt.listening.label: Listening & discussion: lectures, podcasts, talking it through
step.7.opt.mix.label: A mix — I adapt to whatever works
step.7.opt.reading.label: Reading & writing: notes, books, structured materials
step.7.opt.unsure.label: Honestly, I'm still figuring it out
step.7.opt.visual.label: Visual: diagrams, videos, seeing it mapped out
step.7.title: Everyone's different — how do you actually absorb information best?
step.8.opt.art.label: Art, photography, or design
step.8.opt.building.label: Coding or building things (apps, websites, projects)
step.8.opt.downtime.label: Hanging out and recharging — I value my downtime
step.8.opt.gaming.label: Gaming or esports
step.8.opt.leading.label: Running a club, team, or project
step.8.opt.music.label: Music — playing, producing, or singing
step.8.opt.other.label: Something else entirely
step.8.opt.reading.label: Reading — books, articles, deep dives
step.8.opt.sports.label: Sports or fitness (competitive or casual)
step.8.opt.volunteering.label: Volunteering or community work
step.8.opt.watching.label: Watching films, series, or YouTube rabbit holes
step.8.opt.work.label: Part-time job or freelance work
step.8.title: What does your life look like outside of class?
step.9.detail.placeholder: Tell us more in a sentence (optional)
step.9.helper: Think about the last year or two — it doesn't have to be a trophy.
step.9.opt.competed.label: I competed and placed in something
step.9.opt.created.label: I created something — art, code, writing, music
step.9.opt.family.label: I supported my family in an important way
step.9.opt.helped.label: I helped someone in a meaningful way
step.9.opt.led.label: I led or started something — a project, club, event, or initiative
step.9.opt.not_yet.label: I honestly haven't had that moment yet — but I'm working towards it
step.9.opt.pushed.label: I pushed through a really tough time
step.9.opt.skill.label: I got really good at a skill through hard work
step.9.title: What's something you did that made you feel genuinely proud?
